summary: E-commerce merchandising professional with 6 years of luxury digital retail experience at Farfetch in London. Most recently served as Senior Merchandiser for womenswear, managing UK and EU markets with GBP 45M annual GMV across 200+ luxury brand partners. Deep expertise in product curation, sell-through analytics, and conversion optimisation for luxury fashion. Made redundant in January 2026 during Farfetch's post-acquisition restructuring. Experienced in marketplace merchandising, seasonal assortment planning, and personalised recommendation strategies. Looking to bring luxury e-commerce expertise to a direct-to-consumer brand environment.

experience.title: Senior Merchandiser — Womenswear
bullets: Managed digital merchandising strategy for womenswear across UK and EU markets (GBP 45M annual GMV, 200+ luxury brand partners)
Curated seasonal product assortments and homepage content for Farfetch.com, balancing editorial storytelling with sell-through performance targets
Analysed conversion funnels, product page metrics, and search ranking data using Farfetch analytics platform and Google Analytics 4
Partnered with buying team on open-to-buy planning and markdown strategy for luxury ready-to-wear categories
Led personalised product recommendation initiative with data science team, driving a 12% increase in average order value

experience.title: Merchandising Coordinator (promoted from Assistant, 2021)
bullets: Supported senior merchandisers with product uploads, categorisation, and taxonomy management on Farfetch marketplace
Managed product data quality for 15,000+ SKUs per season, ensuring correct sizing, colour attribution, and brand mapping
Created weekly sell-through reports and category performance dashboards in Looker
Coordinated with boutique partners on inventory availability and fulfilment service level agreements
